results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?contractName ?exchangeName FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data> WHERE {
  ?contract <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Contract> .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_on_exchange> ?exchange .
  ?exchange <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Exchange> .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_name> ?contractName .
  ?exchange <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/exchange_name> ?exchangeName .
  FILTER (?exchangeName = "CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE")
}

results.question: List the asset classes and the number of contracts associated with each, for contracts with a commodity code starting with '00'.
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?assetClass (COUNT(?contract) AS ?numberOfContracts) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data> WHERE {
  ?contract <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Contract> .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_in_asset_class> ?assetClassEntity .
  ?assetClassEntity <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/AssetClass> .
  ?assetClassEntity <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/asset_class> ?assetClass .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_commodity_code> ?commodityCode .
  FILTER (STRSTARTS(?commodityCode, "00"))
} GROUP BY ?assetClass ORDER BY DESC(?numberOfContracts)

per_seed.sql: SELECT "T1"."asset_class", COUNT("T2"."contract_code") FROM "AssetClass" AS "T1" JOIN "Contract" AS "T2" ON "T1"."commodity_code" = "T2"."contract_commodity_code" WHERE "T2"."contract_commodity_code" LIKE '00%' GROUP BY "T1"."asset_class"

per_seed.answer: No results found.

CORN | Agriculture
SOYBEAN OIL | Financial

OATS | Energy

SELECT DISTINCT ?contract_name ?asset_class FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data> WHERE {
  ?contract <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Contract> .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_name> ?contract_name .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_on_exchange> ?exchange .
  ?exchange <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Exchange> .
  ?exchange <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/exchange_name> "CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE" .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_in_asset_class> ?assetClass .
  ?assetClass <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/AssetClass> .

}

results.question: For each report year, what is the average 'position_open_interest' for swap positions associated with contracts that have a 'contract_commodity_code' of '001'?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?report_year (AVG(xsd:float(?open_interest)) AS ?average_open_interest) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data> WHERE {
  ?position <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/SwapPosition> .
  ?position <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/position_open_interest> ?open_interest .
  ?position <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/position_for_contract> ?contract .
  ?contract <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/Contract> .
  ?contract <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/contract_commodity_code> "001" .
  ?position <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/position_on_date> ?reportDate .
  ?reportDate <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/type/ReportDate> .
  ?reportDate <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cftc-swap-data/pred/report_year> ?report_year .
} GROUP BY ?report_year
ORDER BY ?report_year

per_seed.sql: SELECT "T3"."report_year", ROUND(AVG("T1"."position_open_interest"), 2) FROM "SwapPosition" AS "T1" JOIN "Contract" AS "T2" ON "T1"."position_contract_code" = "T2"."contract_code" JOIN "ReportDate" AS "T3" ON "T1"."position_report_date" = "T3"."report_date" WHERE "T2"."contract_commodity_code" = '001' GROUP BY "T3"."report_year";
all_sql_attempts: SELECT "T3"."report_year", ROUND(AVG("T1"."position_open_interest"), 2) FROM "SwapPosition" AS "T1" JOIN "Contract" AS "T2" ON "T1"."position_contract_code" = "T2"."contract_code" JOIN "ReportDate" AS "T3" ON "T1"."position_report_date" = "T3"."report_date" WHERE "T2"."contract_commodity_code" = '001' GROUP BY "T3"."report_year";
per_seed.answer: report_year: 2024, ROUND(AVG("T1"."position_open_interest"), 2): 241405.14

per_seed.sql: SELECT "T3"."report_year", ROUND(AVG("T1"."position_open_interest"), 2) FROM "SwapPosition" AS "T1" JOIN "Contract" AS "T2" ON "T1"."position_contract_code" = "T2"."contract_code" JOIN "ReportDate" AS "T3" ON "T1"."position_report_date" = "T3"."report_date" WHERE "T2"."contract_commodity_code" = '001' GROUP BY "T3"."report_year";

per_seed.answer: report_year: 2024, ROUND(AVG("T1"."position_open_interest"), 2): 241405.14

results.question: Find the contract names for contracts that have swap positions with a 'position_swap_long' greater than 100000 and are associated with an asset class of 'Energy'.

per_seed.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2."contract_name" FROM "SwapPosition" AS T1 JOIN "Contract" AS T2 ON T1."position_contract_code" = T2."contract_code" JOIN "AssetClass" AS T3 ON T2."contract_commodity_code" = T3."commodity_code" WHERE T1."position_swap_long" > 100000 AND T3."asset_class" = 'Energy'
all_sql_attempts: SELECT DISTINCT T2."contract_name" FROM "SwapPosition" AS T1 JOIN "Contract" AS T2 ON T1."position_contract_code" = T2."contract_code" JOIN "AssetClass" AS T3 ON T2."contract_commodity_code" = T3."commodity_code" WHERE T1."position_swap_long" > 100000 AND T3."asset_class" = 'Energy'
per_seed.answer: SOYBEANS

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table SwapPosition: 13601 rows (from SwapPosition.csv)
CREATE TABLE "SwapPosition" (
  "position_id" TEXT,
  "position_contract_code" INTEGER,
  "position_report_date" TEXT,
  "position_open_interest" INTEGER,
  "position_swap_long" INTEGER,
  "position_swap_short" INTEGER,
  "position_swap_spread" INTEGER,
  "position_money_manager_long" INTEGER,
  "position_money_manager_short" INTEGER,
  "position_producer_long" INTEGER,
  "position_producer_short" INTEGER,
  "position_other_reportable_long" INTEGER,
  "position_other_reportable_short" INTEGER,
  "position_nonreportable_long" INTEGER,
  "position_nonreportable_short" INTEGER,
  "position_pct_oi_swap_long" REAL,
  "position_pct_oi_swap_short" REAL,
  "position_traders_swap_long" INTEGER,
  "position_traders_swap_short" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from SwapPosition:
--   position_id='P-000001', position_contract_code='001602', position_report_date='2024-12-31', position_open_interest='460417', position_swap_long='68572', position_swap_short='8465', position_swap_spread='22780', position_money_manager_long='80896', position_money_manager_short='171814', position_producer_long='72875', position_producer_short='58349', position_other_reportable_long='55362', position_other_reportable_short='40908', position_nonreportable_long='33927', position_nonreportable_short='32096', position_pct_oi_swap_long='14.9', position_pct_oi_swap_short='1.8', position_traders_swap_long='24', position_traders_swap_short='7'
--   position_id='P-000002', position_contract_code='001602', position_report_date='2024-12-24', position_open_interest='460438', position_swap_long='68365', position_swap_short='7903', position_swap_spread='22722', position_money_manager_long='76971', position_money_manager_short='180048', position_producer_long='83339', position_producer_short='58843', position_other_reportable_long='55072', position_other_reportable_short='39261', position_nonreportable_long='35490', position_nonreportable_short='33182', position_pct_oi_swap_long='14.8', position_pct_oi_swap_short='1.7', position_traders_swap_long='22', position_traders_swap_short='9'

-- Table Contract: 311 rows (from Contract.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Contract" (
  "contract_code" TEXT,
  "contract_name" TEXT,
  "contract_exchange" TEXT,
  "contract_commodity_code" INTEGER,
  "contract_units" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Contract:
--   contract_code='001602', contract_name='WHEAT-SRW', contract_exchange='CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE', contract_commodity_code='001', contract_units='(CONTRACTS OF 5,000 BUSHELS)'
--   contract_code='001612', contract_name='WHEAT-HRW', contract_exchange='CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE', contract_commodity_code='001', contract_units='(CONTRACTS OF 5,000 BUSHELS)'

-- Table Exchange: 10 rows (from Exchange.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Exchange" (
  "exchange_name" TEXT,
  "exchange_code" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Exchange:
--   exchange_name='CHICAGO BOARD OF TRADE', exchange_code='CBT'
--   exchange_name='MIAX FUTURES EXCHANGE', exchange_code='MGE'

-- Table AssetClass: 43 rows (from AssetClass.csv)
CREATE TABLE "AssetClass" (
  "commodity_code" INTEGER,
  "asset_class" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from AssetClass:
--   commodity_code='001', asset_class='Agriculture'
--   commodity_code='002', asset_class='Agriculture'

-- Table ReportDate: 53 rows (from ReportDate.csv)
CREATE TABLE "ReportDate" (
  "report_date" TEXT,
  "report_year" INTEGER,
  "report_month" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from ReportDate:
--   report_date='2024-12-31', report_year='2024', report_month='12'
--   report_date='2024-12-24', report_year='2024', report_month='12'

-- Table Region: 2 rows (from Region.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Region" (
  "region_code" INTEGER,
  "region_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Region:
--   region_code='00', region_name='Domestic'
--   region_code='01', region_name='International'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   AssetClass.contract_commodity_code -> Contract.contract_code
--   Contract.contract_code -> AssetClass.contract_commodity_code
--   Contract.contract_code -> Exchange.contract_exchange
--   Contract.position_contract_code -> SwapPosition.position_id
--   Exchange.contract_exchange -> Contract.contract_code
--   ReportDate.position_report_date -> SwapPosition.position_id
--   SwapPosition.position_id -> Contract.position_contract_code
--   SwapPosition.position_id -> ReportDate.position_report_date
